arguments.summary: Green phase — all 5 tests pass. Shortener uses SHA-256 first 6 hex chars as code, stores bidirectional mapping (code->url and url->code) with RWMutex for thread safety. Same URL returns same code.
arguments.final_answer: Implemented URL shortener service using TDD. Created service/shortener_test.go with 5 tests covering: code generation (6 chars), empty URL validation, round-trip resolve, not-found error, and idempotent shortening. Then implemented service/shortener.go — uses SHA-256 hash truncated to 6 hex chars, bidirectional maps for O(1) lookup both ways, RWMutex for concurrency safety. All 5 tests pass.
